Global (All).title: Taliban attack on a school in Afghanistan
Global (All).summary: A Taliban attack on a school in Afghanistan has killed and injured several people, highlighting the ongoing conflict in the region.

Global (All).title: Cyberattack on a major US retailer
Global (All).summary: A cyberattack on a major US retailer has compromised sensitive customer data, raising concerns about the impact on consumer trust and the retailer's reputation.

Global (All).title: Protests in France over proposed pension reform
Global (All).summary: Protests are underway in France over proposed pension reform, with thousands of people demanding the government rethink its plans to raise the retirement age.

United States.title: US Supreme Court blocks Biden climate plan
United States.summary: The US Supreme Court has blocked parts of President Biden's climate plan, dealing a blow to efforts to reduce greenhouse gas emissions.

United States.title: Tensions rise over US support for Taiwan at G7
United States.summary: US support for Taiwan has sparked tensions with China, a key issue at the G7 meeting in Japan.

United States.title: US Supreme Court allows Texas law restricting abortion access
United States.summary: The US Supreme Court has allowed a Texas law restricting access to abortion, sparking controversy and protests.

South Korea.title: Protests outside South Korea's presidential office
South Korea.summary: Hundreds of protesters gathered outside South Korea's presidential office to protest the government's handling of economy and corruption. There were clashes between police and protesters, with some arrested.

South Korea.title: US-South Korea military drills cancelled due to COVID-19
South Korea.summary: The US and South Korea have cancelled joint military drills due to COVID-19 concerns. The drills were previously scheduled to take place in June, but have now been postponed indefinitely.

South Korea.title: South Korea confirms first case of Monkeypox
South Korea.summary: South Korea has confirmed its first case of Monkeypox, a rare viral disease. The infected individual has been isolated and is receiving treatment.

Japan.title: North Korea fires ballistic missiles near Japan
Japan.summary: North Korea fired two ballistic missiles into the sea near Japan on July 4, triggering Japanese Prime Minister Fumio Kishida to order a meeting of the national security council.

Japan.title: Japan's population shrinks for 13th straight year, hitting record low
Japan.summary: According to data from the Ministry of Internal Affairs and Communications, Japan's population declined by 346,000 in 2022, bringing the total population to a record low of 58.37 million.

Japan.title: Typhoon Mawar approaches Japan, residents prepare for strong winds
Japan.summary: A powerful typhoon is expected to hit Japan's southernmost islands, with strong winds and heavy rainfall prompting residents to stock up on food and supplies.
